title: Nextcraft
description: A Cute and Fun Modpack with tons of perfomance Optimization
body:
### A Modpack with a cool mix of Adventure, Technology sprinkled with a touch of magic!

Based on Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge.

Currently based on TONS of performance mods like Distand Horizons with shader Support, with a fresh breeeze of Beautiful Worldgen

Most important mods are:

- RFTools
- Waystones
- Not Enought Animations
- Refined Storage
- Storage Drawers
- RFTools
- Pipez
- Create
- CC:Tweaked
And many more smaller addons!

If you have any wishes for mods being added just dm me on Discord!

There are 2 non Modrinth mods: 🙄
- [Bobby Reforged](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bobby-reforged)
- [Mowzie's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs)
